# Project State — Marine Guardian Command Center
# Auto-generated by Claude Code after every task. Never edit manually. (File path kept in .cline/ for historical continuity; Cline deprecated V31.)
# Updated: 2026-05-26 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 main-session — Fuel Logging UI shipped)

PHASE:        Fuel Logging UI shipped — Phase 7 Feature Update on top of Phase 8 Batches 4+5+6.2c backend.
              Closes the last UI gap from PRODUCT.md §111-128. /fuel route now operable end-to-end:
              operators log fuel via shadcn Dialog (area select from areaBoundary.list + date input +
              decimal-string liters + totalPrice + notes textarea); chronological table with area + date
              range filters + cursor pagination; role-gated row actions (Edit: operator on OWN, coordinator+
              on any; Delete: site_admin+); cross-area consumption analytics panel with 5 period grains
              (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/annually), KPI cards (total liters / total cost / total
              seaborne km / average L/km), recharts LineChart for L/km trend, per-area breakdown table.
              Sidebar nav entry added with i18n for en + id + ms. Receipt photo upload deferred to
              follow-up batch (locked decision in DECISIONS_LOG.md — no presigned URL infra exists in
              packages/storage; building it would push scope Tier 2 → Tier 3).

              SOURCE CHANGES (8 NEW + 8 MODIFIED):
              NEW FILES:
              - apps/web/src/server/fuel-analytics/get-fuel-consumption.ts NEW (~330 LOC) —
                cross-area aggregation with 5 period grains. Exports getFuelConsumption +
                tenantLocalPeriodLabel helper. Distinct from per-area-report Page 3 builder
                (locked monthly + single-area design — see DECISIONS_LOG.md "Cross-area Fuel
                Consumption analytics built as a new module"). Buckets fuel entries by
                dateReceived + seaborne patrols by startTime + areaBoundaryId. ISO 8601
                week-numbering. resolveTenantOffsetMinutes duplicated inline (intentional —
                extract deferred to 3rd consumer or DST tenant arrival).
              - apps/web/src/server/fuel-analytics/__tests__/get-fuel-consumption.test.ts NEW
                (~520 LOC, 23 vitest cases): grain coverage (6), empty + currency fallback (3),
                aggregation incl. foot-patrol exclusion + null-distance exclusion + null-km
                divide guard (4), perArea breakdown incl. null-areaBoundary Unallocated bucket
                + alphabetical sort (3), trend bucketing across month/day/quarter grains (3),
                query shape forwarding to both findMany calls (4). Mock prisma via vi.mock
                pattern matching per-area-report tests.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/page.tsx NEW (~90 LOC) — orchestrator mirroring
                patrol-areas/page.tsx pattern. Single-target dialog state vars driven from table
                row callbacks. Role derivation from session.user.roles (isOperator / isCoordinator /
                isAdmin). Mounts FuelAnalyticsPanel above entries table.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/fuel-entry-table.tsx NEW (~240 LOC) — shadcn
                Table with area dropdown + date-from + date-to filters. Cursor pagination +
                accumulated row state. Row-level canEdit gate (operator on OWN entry, coordinator+
                on any). Admin-only Delete button. Decimal liters/totalPrice cast via
                `as unknown as FuelEntryRow[]` to bridge Prisma Decimal type → wire string.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/create-fuel-entry-dialog.tsx NEW (~250 LOC) —
                shadcn Dialog wrapping form. Area Select from areaBoundary.list. Decimal-string
                inputs matching positiveDecimalString regex /^\d+(\.\d+)?$/. Notes textarea (native
                HTML — shadcn ui dir has no textarea component). Client-side validation with
                inline error display. trpc.fuelEntry.create.useMutation invalidating both
                fuelEntry.list + fuelEntry.consumptionAnalytics on success. Receipt photo field
                intentionally omitted per locked decision.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/edit-fuel-entry-dialog.tsx NEW (~280 LOC) — same
                form shape as Create but pre-populated from row props via useEffect. Routes to
                fuelEntry.update (owner) OR fuelEntry.updateAny (coordinator+ on non-owned) based
                on isOwner check from session userId. updateAny banner shown when editing another
                user's entry.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/delete-fuel-entry-dialog.tsx NEW (~110 LOC) —
                shadcn Dialog confirmation. trpc.fuelEntry.delete.useMutation with same
                invalidation pattern. Destructive button variant. Displays area name + date
                in confirmation copy.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/fuel/fuel-analytics-panel.tsx NEW (~330 LOC) —
                Card-wrapped panel. Period grain Select (5 options). Area filter Select + date
                range pickers (default last 90 days). KPI row of 4 cards using Intl.NumberFormat
                for currency. shadcn Chart wrapping recharts LineChart for L/km trend (monotone
                line, no dots, hsl(--primary) stroke). Per-area Table breakdown sorted by
                areaName. Calls trpc.fuelEntry.consumptionAnalytics with date validation gating
                (null input disables query to prevent firing while user is mid-edit).

              MODIFIED FILES:
              - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/fuelEntry.ts EDITED (+~35 LOC) — added
                consumptionAnalytics tenantProcedure. Resolves tenant timezone + currency from
                prisma.tenant.findFirst then forwards to getFuelConsumption. Throws
                INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on missing tenant. Imports
                fuelConsumptionAnalyticsInputSchema from shared.
              - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/fuelEntry.test.ts EDITED (+~80 LOC,
                +4 cases) — extended prisma mock with patrol.findMany; added describe block
                covering tenant resolve + INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR + cross-query tenant scoping +
                areaBoundaryIds forwarding to both findMany calls.
              - packages/shared/src/schemas/fuel-entry.ts EDITED (+~20 LOC) — exported
                fuelPeriodGrainSchema enum + fuelConsumptionAnalyticsInputSchema +
                FuelPeriodGrain TS type.
              - apps/web/src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx EDITED (+2 LOC) — Fuel lucide icon
                import + nav entry { href: "/fuel", icon: Fuel, labelKey: "fuel" } inserted at
                slot 7 between patrol-areas and observations.
              - apps/web/messages/en.json EDITED (+1 line) — "fuel": "Fuel".
              - apps/web/messages/id.json EDITED (+1 line) — "fuel": "Bahan Bakar".
              - apps/web/messages/ms.json EDITED (+1 line) — "fuel": "Bahan Api".

              VALIDATION:
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web test: 582/582 passing across 61 files.
                Baseline 555 → +27 (23 fuel-analytics + 4 fuelEntry.consumptionAnalytics).
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web typecheck: clean (zero errors after fixing
                two initial issues: Decimal→string cast in fuel-entry-table.tsx, and 4 query-
                shape tests that poked Prisma's deeply-unioned where types — refactored to a
                permissive local WhereShape view).
              - pnpm --filter @marine-guardian/web lint: clean (zero errors, --max-warnings 0).
              - Cross-package regression: jobs unchanged, storage unchanged, shared unchanged.
              - Full pnpm lint: 6/6 packages green.
              - Full pnpm typecheck: shared + jobs clean. db package fails on pre-existing
                @types/node issue unrelated to this feature.
              - Manual visual QA: DEFERRED to human (no browser drive in main session).
                Recommended human follow-up: open /fuel as super_admin, click Log Fuel, fill
                form, save, verify row + analytics refresh; switch period grain Daily↔Quarterly,
                verify trend chart re-buckets; Edit liters, save, verify table refresh; Delete,
                confirm, verify row removed; switch to field_operator role on another user's
                entry, verify Edit button absent.
